    def test_complete_bike_booking_flow(self):
    
        # Step 1: Login
        LoginHelper.login_into_matterverse(self.driver)
    
        # Step 2: Navigate to My Orders
        self.home_page.click_account_tab()
        self.account_page.click_my_orders()
    
        # Step 3: Click Book Your Aera
        self.driver.find_element(*self.book_aera_page.BOOK_YOUR_AERA_BTN).click()
        time.sleep(2)
    
        # Select AERA 5000+
        self.driver.find_element(*self.book_aera_page.AERA_5000_PLUS_OPTION).click()
        time.sleep(2)
    
        # Step 4: Select Random Bike Color (1–5)
        random_color = random.randint(1, 5)
        self.driver.find_element(
            *self.book_aera_page.bike_color_option(random_color)
        ).click()
        time.sleep(2)
    
        # Validate Bike Image
        assert self.driver.find_element(
            *self.book_aera_page.BIKE_IMAGE
        ).is_displayed()
    
        # Step 5: Enter Location / Pincode
        self.driver.find_element(
            *self.book_aera_page.ENTER_YOUR_LOC_FIELD
        ).click()
        time.sleep(1)
    
        self.driver.find_element(
            *self.book_aera_page.ENTER_YOUR_LOC_INPUT_FIELD
        ).send_keys("413502")
        time.sleep(2)
    
        # Select Random Location from List
        locations = self.driver.find_elements(
            *self.book_aera_page.LOCATIONS_LIST
        )
    
        random_index = random.randint(0, len(locations) - 1)
        locations[random_index].click()
        time.sleep(5)
